eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Oregon; Clark, WA; at 12:33 PM on MAY 29, 2019 Effective until 3:33 PM. Message from OEM,1,OR.
extra_text: The is a test alert from the Oregon Office of Emergency Management.  No action is required. No action is needed. This is only a test.
